sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28750" key="du/saulos2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠ´σ-αυλος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔρις</foreign> <sense id="n28750.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">an unhappy</tr_> contest <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with the flute</tr_> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">αὐλός</etym>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.266</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
